[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000101110 4
7 000000000 a

23 32 000111110 5

67 76 000000101 2
70 07 110000101 4

24 42 000011000 2
35 53 000100110 3
46 64 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 7
